name: Queen of Pawns
description_short: Queen of Pawns Kissimmee, Florida — Florida-based pawnshop chain since 1995 offering instant cash pawns, selling items for cash, and discounted shopping...
description_long:
Queen of Pawns was founded on March 28, 1995, with its first location in Lake Worth, Florida, and has grown to operate 15 locations across Florida's major markets including Miami, Tampa, Orlando, and Palm Beach County. The company positions itself as a sustainable shopping and quick-cash alternative, serving communities that need immediate liquidity without credit checks or storage fees.

The company offers three primary services: (1) Instant Cash Pawn—borrowing against personal valuables with the option to reclaim them; (2) Sell for Cash—permanently selling unwanted items like jewelry, electronics, tools, and luxury goods; and (3) Shop and Save—purchasing pre-owned inventory at 30-60% below retail prices. They accept a wide range of collateral including gold and broken jewelry, natural diamonds, luxury watches, designer items, electronics, computers, power tools, lawn equipment, sporting goods, musical instruments, motorcycles, jet skis, and vehicles. The company also operates an online store shipping nationwide and maintains an eBay presence.

Queen of Pawns differentiates itself through explicit transparency about fees (claiming no storage fees or hidden charges), a free layaway program requiring only 10% down with no credit checks, and emphasis on being a sustainable alternative to retail consumption. Their longevity (31 years in operation), multi-location presence, online shopping capability, and mission statement focused on community empowerment and sustainable practices set them apart from single-location competitors.

As a pawnshop, Queen of Pawns is best suited for consumers needing short-term cash against collateral without credit impact, those looking to sell items quickly for cash, and bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned luxury and electronics. The primary caveat is that pawn rates and buyback prices are determined by individual pawnbrokers and market conditions—not standardized—so consumers should compare offers across locations.
pros: No credit checks required for pawn or sale transactions
No storage fees or hidden fees explicitly stated
Free layaway with only 10% down payment and flexible installment schedule
Wide range of acceptable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, vehicles, etc.)
15 physical Florida locations plus nationwide online shopping capability
31-year operating history with established community presence
Transparent mission statement emphasizing sustainable shopping and no credit penalties for unredeemed pawns
cons: Pawn rates and buyback offers are not transparent—determined individually by pawnbrokers with no published price guides or rate schedules
Limited geographic footprint (Florida-based with 15 locations; online shopping available but physical pawn/sell services limited to Florida)
Sunday hours significantly reduced (10:30am-3:30pm) and some locations closed Sundays entirely
No information provided on pawn redemption timelines, interest rates, or loan terms length
Competitive shopping alternative (eBay, online store) may indicate inventory turnover challenges and limited selection at individual locations
best_for: Florida residents needing immediate cash against collateral without credit checks or impact
Consumers with pre-owned luxury items, jewelry, electronics, or tools to sell quickly for cash
Bargain shoppers seeking 30-60% discounts on pre-owned designer goods, power tools, and electronics
Individuals seeking flexible payment options through free layaway without credit requirements
diagnosis: Queen of Pawns is best for Florida consumers needing immediate cash against collateral, those liquidating pre-owned items, and bargain hunters seeking deep discounts on luxury goods—with the key caveat that pawn rates are individually negotiated by brokers with no published transparency on loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods. Consumers should visit locations prepared to negotiate and compare offers, and understand that pawn loan terms (duration, percentage cost) are not disclosed on their website.
services: Instant Cash Pawn—short-term loans against personal valuables
Sell for Cash—permanent purchase of unwanted items
Shop and Save—retail shopping on pre-owned discounted inventory
Free Layaway—10% down, no-credit-check installment purchases
Online Store—nationwide shipping of curated inventory
eBay Sales—additional sales channel for inventory
Gold and Jewelry Buying—online portal for remote transactions
Account Management Portal—track transactions, pay extensions, make layaway payments
Mobile Services—15 physical locations across Florida markets
Wide Collateral Acceptance—jewelry, diamonds, watches, electronics, tools, vehicles, motorcycles, jet skis
